_calibration: CALIBRATION FIXTURE (known-bad, deliberately committed): the threshold-guard class (caution.md C-071 - Modern Slavery Act applied to sub-GBP36m SMEs in 5 of 9 forensic audits). applies_when names a turnover threshold ('annual turnover of GBP 36 million or more') but excluded_when is empty: there is no modelled 'below the threshold, excluded' entry, so this law would attach to every firm regardless of size. catalogue/linters/threshold-guard.js MUST flag this as threshold-excluded-when-missing in --calibrate mode, or it has not earned its zero.

records.name: Modern Slavery Act 2015 transparency statement (calibration fixture: missing size exclusion)
applies_when: commercial organisation with annual turnover of GBP 36 million or more operating in the UK

website_obligations.duty: Publish an annual modern slavery and human trafficking transparency statement
elements: published on the website homepage or a link from it

sources: calibration fixture (deliberately seeded missing size exclusion)
